text:
# Request a court bailiff to deliver papers: Form D89

Use this form to ask for a court bailiff to hand deliver papers to the other party in family court proceedings.

## Form Content

Case number
Request for personal service by Name of applicant
a court bailiff
Name of respondent
Date
Day Month Year
I request that the court bailiff serve the application in this case.
1. Type of case Note 1: For example,
injuction, child
arrangements, divorce,
dissolution, separation etc.
2. The full name of the respondent is
3. The respondent’s date of birth
Day Month Year
4. The respondent’s phone number
HMCTS USE ONLY
Page 1
D89 Request for personal service by a court bailiff (01.25) ©Crown copyright 2025

5. Please provide a description of the person or if available a recent
photograph.
height
hair colour
eye colour
ethnicity
and any distinguishing marks or features.
I enclose a recent photograph of the person Note 5: Any photograph
provided must only contain
I do not have a recent photograph of the person an image of the respondent.
6. When would be the best time(s) for service?
7. Is the respondent currently resident in a refuge?
Yes
No
Do not know
Page 2

8. The address (in England and Wales) at which bailiff service should
be attempted is:
Building and street
Second line of address
Town or city
County (optional)
Postcode
9. If they have a vehicle please give details
Manufacturer
Model
Colour
Registration no.
10. In your dealings with the respondent or other occupants of the
property (if applicable) have you encountered or are you aware of
any of the following?
Has the respondent ever been violent or been convicted of a violent
offence?
Yes
No
Not known
Page 3
